name: dhcp-server-relay
description: A central Cisco IOS DHCP server (R1) leasing two LANs: one it is directly attached to, and one behind a second router (R2) acting as a DHCP relay agent with ip helper-address. Shows the DHCP server pool config, the relay, and how a relayed lease differs from a direct one. Base for the DHCP server and relay article.

nodes.name: R2
nodes.extra: DHCP relay agent; route to 192.168.10.0/24 via R1

nodes.name: ClientB
nodes.extra: leases 192.168.20.11 from R1 across the R2 relay
